dual_intent_strategy.primary_intent: authority hub — buyer protection, safety, regulation education
dual_intent_strategy.resolution: Hub: the 3 protections every buyer should run (verify the licence, know the smuggling red flags, check the health paperwork), each summarised and routed to its child guide.

meta_title: Learn Before You Buy: Puppy Safety Guides | Curious Tails
meta_description: Buyer-protection guides for Singapore puppy buyers: verify any pet shop's AVS licence in 60 seconds, spot smuggled-puppy red flags, and read health paperwork properly.
h1: Learn Before You Buy: Pet Safety & Buyer Protection

entity_definitions.definition: Buying a puppy safely in Singapore takes three checks: verify the seller on the AVS public registry (60 seconds), know the red flags of smuggled puppies (below-market prices, no premises, no paperwork), and confirm the health records (vaccinations at weeks 6 and 8, microchip, deworming) before homecoming.

top_competitor_weaknesses: shops don't educate against their own industry's bad actors

lsi_keyword_weighting.instruction: Education-first hub; the only ask is 'check us first'.

content_outline.heading: Learn Before You Buy: Pet Safety & Buyer Protection
How do you buy a puppy safely in Singapore?
3 routed guide cards + why-we-teach-this + FAQ + CTA
content_outline.first_party_prompt: Insider knowledge: unlicensed = smuggled; price gap economics.

faq.question: What's the single most important check?
faq.answer_direction: The AVS registry search; unlisted = unlicensed, whatever the seller claims.

faq.question: Why does a pet shop teach buyers to verify shops?
faq.answer_direction: Because we pass the check and the bad actors don't; education is our best marketing and the buyer's best protection.

faq.question: Are Carousell/Telegram puppy listings safe?
faq.answer_direction: Treat unverifiable sellers there as unlicensed by default; run the registry check before any contact deposit.

faq.question: What paperwork should a legitimate puppy come with?
faq.answer_direction: Vaccination records (weeks 6/8 done by homecoming), microchip details, deworming record, and licensing done properly.
